expectations.text: Registers gossip hello(1) and select(2) on entry 800001
expectations.evidence: Used WRONG event IDs: RegisterCreatureGossipEvent(800001,2,Hello) and (...,3,Select). Correct ids are 1=ON_HELLO, 2=ON_SELECT. As written the menu never opens.

expectations.text: Hello builds menu via GossipMenuAddItem + GossipSendMenu
Select dispatches intid and closes via GossipComplete

expectations.evidence: callbacks include event; methods real (but registered under wrong event ids)
